Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests

Class AutoFormulaRewriterL4Tests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.AbstractFormulaRewriterTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.PredicateSimplifierTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.AutoFormulaRewriterTests

org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.AutoFormulaRewriterL2Tests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.AutoFormulaRewriterL3Tests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.AutoFormulaRewriterL4Tests
Direct Known Subclasses:
AutoFormulaRewriterL5Tests
public class AutoFormulaRewriterL4Tests extends AutoFormulaRewriterL3Tests
This is the class for testing automatic rewriter L4 AutoRewriterImpl using the abstract auto formula rewriter tests AbstractAutoFormulaRewriterTests.
